rounds.passage: It must be so fine for you and your dear little ones to be going home for the holidays.
rounds.hint: Of high quality; giving satisfaction

rounds.passage: She is tolerable, but not handsome enough to tempt me.
rounds.hint: To entice someone toward something they might resist

rounds.passage: You must allow me to tell you how ardently I admire and love you.
rounds.hint: To regard with respect and warm approval

rounds.passage: I have been a selfish being all my life, in practice, though not in principle.
rounds.hint: Chiefly concerned with one's own profit or pleasure

rounds.passage: Happiness in marriage is entirely a matter of chance.
rounds.hint: Wholly; to the full or absolute extent

rounds.passage: She had a lively, playful disposition which delighted in anything ridiculous.
rounds.hint: A person's inherent qualities of mind and character

rounds.passage: Nothing is so painful to the human mind as a great and sudden change.
rounds.hint: The element of a person that enables thought and feeling

rounds.passage: Beware; for I am fearless, and therefore quite powerful.
rounds.hint: To a certain or fairly significant extent

rounds.passage: I felt the greatest eagerness to learn the origin of this creature.
rounds.hint: The point or place where something begins or is derived from

rounds.passage: My imagination was vivid, yet my powers of analysis were intense.
rounds.hint: Of extreme force, degree, or strength

rounds.passage: I have love in me the likes of which you can scarcely imagine.
rounds.hint: Only just; almost not at all

rounds.passage: My imagination was too much exalted by my first success to permit me to doubt of my ability.
rounds.hint: The faculty of forming new ideas not present to the senses

rounds.passage: A bold young lad stood in the doorway, knife in hand.
rounds.hint: Showing willingness to take risks; confident and courageous

rounds.passage: Pieces of eight! Pieces of eight! cried the parrot.
rounds.hint: The cardinal number between seven and nine

rounds.passage: The pirates came out of the forest on the left with a sudden charge.
rounds.hint: A large area covered chiefly with trees and undergrowth

rounds.passage: Silver himself was nowhere to be seen; he had slipped away somewhere in the night.
rounds.hint: Moved quietly and quickly so as not to be noticed

rounds.passage: They found the treasure at last, buried deep beneath the old pine tree.
rounds.hint: A quantity of precious metals, gems, or other valuable objects

rounds.passage: Doubloons and pieces of eight were scattered everywhere on the floor.
rounds.hint: Spread or distributed over a wide area

rounds.passage: The Time Traveller came back and looked hard at me over the table.
rounds.hint: Done with great effort or force; not easily done

rounds.passage: The whole world will be intelligent, educated, and cooperating.
rounds.hint: Complete in every part; not lacking or leaving out any part

rounds.passage: I have thought more than is good for me about the nature of time.
rounds.hint: The basic or inherent features of something

rounds.passage: The machine was steady, and the whole ride was wonderfully smooth.
rounds.hint: An apparatus using mechanical power to perform a task

rounds.passage: The darkness grew apace with a cold sensation against my face.
rounds.hint: The partial or total absence of light

rounds.passage: I am afraid I cannot convey the peculiar sensations of time travelling.
rounds.hint: Making a journey; moving from one place to another over time

rounds.passage: Take nothing on its looks; take everything on evidence.
rounds.hint: To lay hold of something; to get into one's possession

rounds.passage: I loved her against reason, against promise, against peace, against hope.
rounds.hint: Freedom from disturbance; tranquility of mind or surroundings

rounds.passage: Suffering has been stronger than all other teaching, and has taught me to understand.
rounds.hint: Past tense of teach; having imparted knowledge to someone

rounds.passage: No varnish can hide the grain of the wood; the more varnish you put on, the more the grain will express itself.
rounds.hint: To convey a thought or feeling in words or by gestures

rounds.passage: I resolved to tell Joe all that I had witnessed; something that I had promised.
rounds.hint: Made a declaration assuring one will or will not do something

rounds.passage: In the little world in which children have their existence, nothing is so finely felt as injustice.
rounds.hint: The fact or state of living or having objective reality

rounds.passage: I want you to believe in things that you cannot see.
rounds.hint: To have a desire or wish for something

rounds.passage: Listen to the children of the night. What music they make!
rounds.hint: The period of darkness between sunset and sunrise

rounds.passage: The castle is a veritable prison and I am a prisoner.
rounds.hint: A large medieval building, typically fortified

rounds.passage: We learn from failure, not from success. That is the whole secret.
rounds.hint: Lack of success; the omission of expected or required action

rounds.passage: My brain was dizzy; I cannot tell how long it lasted, but I suffered greatly.
rounds.hint: Experienced pain, distress, or hardship

rounds.passage: I have a sort of expectation that something will happen.
rounds.hint: A strong belief that something will happen or be the case

rounds.passage: Call me Ishmael. Some years ago, I had little money in my purse.
rounds.hint: To address someone by a name; to summon or invite

rounds.passage: A whale ship was my Yale College and my Harvard.
rounds.hint: A very large marine mammal with a torpedo-shaped body

rounds.passage: Better to sleep with a sober cannibal than a drunken Christian.
rounds.hint: Of a more excellent or effective type or quality

rounds.passage: To produce a mighty book, you must choose a mighty theme.
rounds.hint: To bring something into existence; to make or manufacture

rounds.passage: I know not all that may be coming, but I will go to it laughing.
rounds.hint: Making the sounds and movements that express amusement

rounds.passage: I am tormented with an everlasting itch for things remote.
rounds.hint: Experiencing or causing severe physical or mental suffering
